en_title: Persona 6 Announced, Coming to Xbox Game Pass
cn_title: 《女神异闻录6》正式公布，首发加入XGP
subtitle: 十年等待，终于来了
opus_summary: 《女神异闻录6》在Xbox Showcase公布，登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series X|S，首发加入XGP。预告片仅展示墓地场景，未透露发售日期。

paragraphs.en: Persona 6 is real, and coming to Xbox Game Pass when it does arrive.
paragraphs.cn: 《女神异闻录6》真的来了，而且发售时将首发加入Xbox Game Pass。

paragraphs.en: Today's announcement trailer, shown during the Xbox Showcase livestream, gave basically no details on the game — we simply saw some quick flashes of what looked like a graveyard.
paragraphs.cn: 今天的公布预告片在Xbox Showcase直播中播出，但基本没有透露游戏细节——我们只看到了一些快速闪过的画面，看起来像是一片墓地。

paragraphs.en: No word on a release date was given, unfortunately. What we do know for certain, however, is it's coming to PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S, including via Game Pass.
paragraphs.cn: 遗憾的是，官方没有公布发售日期。不过我们可以确定的是，游戏将登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series X|S，并且会通过Game Pass提供。

paragraphs.en: It's been a full 10 years since Persona 5, though fans were aware a big reveal was coming after recent leaks seemed to show the game's logo and protagonists . Today's teaser trailer confirmed the logo was indeed real.
paragraphs.cn: 距离《女神异闻录5》已经整整过去了10年，不过粉丝们此前通过近期泄露（似乎展示了游戏logo和主角）已经预感到会有重大公布。今天的预告片证实了那个logo确实是真货。

paragraphs.en: "An entirely new story is about to unfold," reads a desription for the teaser. "The highly anticipated next chapter of the iconic RPG series delivers a bold, new standalone story blending heartfelt daily life and new characters with pulse-pounding, supernatural adventure. Whether it's your first Persona game or you've been here since the beginning, this one's for you."
paragraphs.cn: 「一个全新的故事即将展开，」预告片的描述写道。「这款备受期待的标志性RPG系列下一章，将带来一个大胆的全新独立故事，融合了感人的日常生活、新角色以及令人心跳加速的超自然冒险。无论你是第一次接触《女神异闻录》，还是从系列之初就一路相伴，这款游戏都是为你准备的。」

paragraphs.en: A store page for the game confirms Persona 6 will, unsurprisingly, once again feature "the signature blend of heartfelt daily life and pulse-pounding supernatural adventure" as you lead a double life in modern day Japan.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏的商店页面确认，《女神异闻录6》将再次呈现「标志性的感人日常生活与令人心跳加速的超自然冒险的融合」，玩家将在现代日本过着双重生活。

paragraphs.en: "Navigate the rhythms of everyday school life and build friendships, pursue romance, and cultivate memories that matter. But beneath the surface of familiar streets and quiet neighborhoods lies something darker: strange rumors, unsettling urban legends, and occult incidents that only you and your closest allies can face.
paragraphs.cn: 「在每日校园生活的节奏中前行，建立友谊、追求浪漫、培养珍贵的回忆。但在熟悉的街道和宁静的社区表面之下，隐藏着更黑暗的东西：奇怪的谣言、令人不安的都市传说，以及只有你和最亲密的伙伴才能面对的灵异事件。」

paragraphs.en: "Awaken the power of Persona, a manifestation of your innermost self, and discover others who share this extraordinary ability. Every relationship you nurture makes you stronger. Every bond you forge becomes a weapon against the darkness lurking within."
paragraphs.cn: 「唤醒Persona的力量——你内心自我的具现化，并发现其他拥有这种非凡能力的人。你培养的每一段关系都会让你变得更强。你结下的每一份羁绊，都会成为对抗潜伏在内心黑暗的武器。」

paragraphs.en: In the meantime, fans have Persona 4 Revival to look forward to. That's set to launch in February 2027 and will also launch as part of Xbox Game Pass.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，粉丝们还可以期待《女神异闻录4：复兴版》。该作将于2027年2月发售，同样会作为Xbox Game Pass的一部分推出。

paragraphs.en: "We are delighted to officially announce our work on the next installment of the Persona series and look forward to sharing the incredible efforts that the entire team is putting into Persona 6 for its release after Persona 4 Revival," said P-Studio director Kazuhisa Wada. "As we take this next step, we are thrilled the launch date is set for Persona 4 Revival and fans get to encounter a fresh and modernized experience as they discover the mysteries hidden in Inaba."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们很高兴正式宣布正在开发《女神异闻录》系列下一部作品，并期待分享整个团队为《女神异闻录6》所付出的巨大努力，该作将在《女神异闻录4：复兴版》之后发售，」P-Studio总监和田和久表示。「迈出这一步的同时，我们也很激动《女神异闻录4：复兴版》的发售日期已经确定，粉丝们将能在探索稻羽市隐藏的谜团时，体验到焕然一新的现代化体验。」

paragraphs.en: For more, be sure to check out IGN's roundup of everything announced at Xbox Showcase 2026 .
paragraphs.cn: 更多信息，请务必查看IGN整理的Xbox Showcase 2026全部公布内容汇总。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
